policy_note: FairWatchTrade curates independent, boutique, and collector-significant timepieces. Curation is the product.

brands.name: A. Lange & Söhne
brands.message: A. Lange & Söhne is fully supported. A cornerstone of independent watchmaking.
brands.notes: All references welcome including boutique and limited editions.

brands.name: Audemars Piguet
brands.message: Select Audemars Piguet references are accepted. Royal Oak and Royal Oak Offshore are excluded due to gray market saturation. Vintage, dress, and complicated pieces welcome.
brands.notes: Jumping hours, tourbillons, and dress watches prioritized.

brands.name: Blancpain
brands.message: Blancpain is fully supported. One of the oldest watch manufacture names in continuous production.
brands.notes: Fifty Fathoms, Villeret, and complicated pieces especially welcome.

brands.name: Bovet
brands.message: Bovet is fully supported. Exceptional enamel and complications.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: Breguet
brands.message: Breguet is fully supported. The founding house of fine watchmaking.
brands.notes: Classique, La Tradition, Tourbillon, Marine, and Reine de Naples all welcome.

brands.name: Cartier
brands.message: Cartier is fully supported. Iconic design heritage with genuine collector significance.
brands.notes: Tank, Santos, Pasha, Ballon Bleu, Crash, and vintage references all welcome.

brands.name: Chopard
brands.message: Select Chopard references accepted. L.U.C manufacture pieces and vintage references welcome. Fashion-oriented quartz pieces excluded.
brands.notes: Must be a mechanical piece with collector significance.

brands.name: Credor
brands.message: Credor is fully supported. Seiko's pinnacle — essentially handmade with independent watchmaker standards.
brands.notes: All references welcome. Extremely rare in the US market.

brands.name: Czapek
brands.message: Czapek is fully supported. A revived Geneva independent with exceptional finishing.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: De Bethune
brands.message: De Bethune is fully supported. Among the most technically innovative independents.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: F.P. Journe
brands.message: F.P. Journe is fully supported. One of the most important independent watchmakers alive.
brands.notes: All references welcome including aluminium series.

brands.name: Franck Muller
brands.message: Select Franck Muller references accepted. Complicated pieces, limited editions, and collector references welcome. High-volume fashion pieces excluded.
brands.notes: Must have complication or documented limited edition status.

brands.name: Grand Seiko
brands.message: Grand Seiko is fully supported. Exceptional finishing and dial craft with a devoted collector base.
brands.notes: All references welcome including Spring Drive and manual wind.

brands.name: Greubel Forsey
brands.message: Greubel Forsey is fully supported. Among the rarest and most technically significant independents.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: H. Moser & Cie
brands.message: H. Moser & Cie is fully supported. Minimalist dial philosophy with exceptional movement finishing.
brands.notes: All references welcome including fumé dials.

brands.name: Hautlence
brands.message: Hautlence is fully supported. Bold independent with distinctive jumping hours architecture.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: IWC Schaffhausen
brands.message: Select IWC references accepted. Portuguese, Portugieser, Grande Complication, and vintage references welcome. Current production entry pieces excluded.
brands.notes: Focus on complicated and vintage pieces.

brands.name: Jaeger-LeCoultre
brands.message: Jaeger-LeCoultre is fully supported. The watchmaker's watchmaker with exceptional manufacture depth.
brands.notes: Reverso, Master, Atmos, Duomètre, and all complicated references welcome.

brands.name: Laurent Ferrier
brands.message: Laurent Ferrier is fully supported. Exceptional Geneva-school finishing from a former Patek master watchmaker.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: Longines
brands.message: Vintage and heritage Longines references accepted. Current heritage reissues and complications welcome. Modern fashion pieces excluded.
brands.notes: Strong preference for pre-2000 vintage and current Heritage line.

brands.name: Louis Erard
brands.message: Select Louis Erard references accepted. Collaboration pieces and limited editions with independent watchmakers welcome.
brands.notes: Collaboration and limited edition pieces prioritized.

brands.name: MB&F
brands.message: MB&F is fully supported. Among the most creative independent watchmakers working today.
brands.notes: All references welcome.

brands.name: Omega
brands.message: Vintage Omega pre-1997 is accepted. Speedmaster references at any era accepted due to collector significance. Post-1997 modern pieces generally excluded.
brands.notes: 1997 cutoff reflects pre-Swatch Group consolidation era. Speedmaster is the exception at any production year.

brands.name: Parmigiani Fleurier
brands.message: Parmigiani Fleurier is fully supported. An independent manufacture of exceptional depth and finishing.
brands.notes: Kalpa, Tonda, Bugatti, and all references welcome.

brands.name: Patek Philippe
brands.message: Select Patek Philippe references accepted. Complicated, vintage, and dress pieces welcome. Nautilus and Aquanaut excluded due to gray market saturation.
brands.notes: Nautilus/Aquanaut are the gray market magnet — everything else is welcome.

brands.name: Philippe Dufour
brands.message: Philippe Dufour is fully supported. Among the greatest living watchmakers. Exceptionally rare.
brands.notes: Any reference is an extraordinary listing opportunity.

brands.name: Richard Mille
brands.message: Select Richard Mille references considered. Technical and limited edition pieces welcome. High-volume fashion pieces reviewed case by case.
brands.notes: Request review — will evaluate based on reference and provenance.

brands.name: Roger Dubuis
brands.message: Select Roger Dubuis references considered. Complicated and limited edition pieces welcome.
brands.notes: Must have genuine complication or limited edition documentation.

brands.name: Seiko
brands.message: Select vintage Seiko references accepted. King Seiko, Lord Marvel, early automatic dress watches with collector significance welcome. Modern Seiko excluded.
brands.notes: Vintage only. Strong collector provenance required. Modern Seiko — including current 5 series — not accepted.

brands.name: TAG Heuer
brands.message: Vintage Heuer (pre-TAG) references accepted. Carrera, Autavia, and Monaco vintage pieces welcome. Modern TAG Heuer generally excluded.
brands.notes: Pre-TAG Heuer only. The vintage Heuer collector market is genuine and strong.

brands.name: Universal Genève
brands.message: Universal Genève is fully supported. A historically significant Geneva manufacture with exceptional vintage collector appeal.
brands.notes: Tri-Compax, Polerouter, Compax all welcome. Vintage only — brand ceased independent production.

brands.name: Ulysse Nardin
brands.message: Select Ulysse Nardin references accepted. Marine Chronometer, Freak, and complicated pieces welcome.
brands.notes: Freak series and complications prioritized.

brands.name: Vacheron Constantin
brands.message: Vacheron Constantin is fully supported. One of the holy trinity with exceptional heritage.
brands.notes: Overseas, Patrimony, Traditionnelle, Les Cabinotiers all welcome.

brands.name: Voutilainen
brands.message: Voutilainen is fully supported. Among the most respected independents in the world.
brands.notes: Any reference is exceptional. Production is extremely limited.

brands.name: Zenith
brands.message: Select Zenith references accepted. El Primero vintage, Chronomaster, and Defy Lab welcome. Modern fashion pieces excluded.
brands.notes: El Primero is a legitimate horological landmark. Vintage and complicated pieces prioritized.

brands.name: Rolex
brands.message: Rolex isn't currently supported on FairWatchTrade. Our marketplace focuses on independent and boutique timepieces. For Rolex, we'd suggest Chrono24 or WatchBox.
brands.notes: Gray market saturation makes curation impossible. Brand decision, not quality judgment.

brands.name: Tudor
brands.message: Tudor isn't currently supported on FairWatchTrade.
brands.notes: Rolex family brand excluded alongside parent.

default_unknown.message: We don't immediately recognize this brand. Submit for manual review — if it's an independent or boutique maker we may not have listed yet, we'd love to consider it.
